title: George judoka on their way to Japan
description: JUDO NEWS - Ruwayda Fortuin of Hoekwil...
bodyText:
JUDO NEWS - Ruwayda Fortuin of Hoekwil Primary School and Zoe de la Croix of Holy Cross in George, and their coach, Lilian Steyn, who will be the team manager, were selected for the Development Judo SA team to compete at the 23rd Sanix International Juvenile Team Championships to be held in Fukuoka, Japan, from 22 to 29 December.


> Both girls are ranked no 1 in South Africa, and this achievement is the result of years of training and dedication.


Eden Judo is exceptionally proud of them and wishes them the best of luck and safe travels.

It also thanks all its sponsors for the donations it received, saying without this help and support, attending the event would not have been possible.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
